zh.Hereford, Herefordshire Unitary Authorit: 英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marguerite Nanton於1473年出生在英國時，她的父親Robert Nanton30歲，母親Hermione Billard-Nessie23歲。她於1498年與Jenkin Weaver在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1524年享年51歲。

zh-hans.Hereford, Herefordshire Unitary Authorit: 英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marguerite Nanton于1473年出生在英国时，她的父亲Robert Nanton30岁，母亲Hermione Billard-Nessie23岁。她于1498年与Jenkin Weaver在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1524年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nanton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire): probably a variant of the Suffolk surname Naunton, a habitational name from Naunton Hall in Rendlesham and possibly also Naughton (both in Suffolk). The latter may derive from the Old Norse personal name Nagli + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marguerite Nanton was born in 1473, in England, her father, Robert Nanton, was 30 and her mother, Hermione Billard-Nessie, was 23. She married Jenkin Weaver in 1498, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1524, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marguerite Nanton est née en 1473, à Angleterre, son père, Robert Nanton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Hermione Billard-Nessie, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Jenkin Weaver en 1498, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1524, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marguerite Nanton 1473 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Nanton 30 und ihre Mutter Hermione Billard-Nessie 23. Sie hat 1498 in England Jenkin Weaver geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1524 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marguerite Nanton è nata il nel 1473 nel England, sua padre, Robert Nanton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Hermione Billard-Nessie, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Jenkin Weaver nel 1498, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1524, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marguerite Nantonが1473年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Robert Nantonは30歳，母Hermione Billard-Nessieは23歳であった。1498年にイギリスでJenkin Weaverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1524年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marguerite Nanton(이)가 1473년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Nanton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hermione Billard-Nessie(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1498년 영국에서 Jenkin Weaver(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Hereford, Herefordshire Unitary Authorit: Hereford, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marguerite Nanton nasceu em 1473, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Nanton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Hermione Billard-Nessie, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Jenkin Weaver em 1498, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1524, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marguerite Nanton родилась в 1473 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Nanton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Hermione Billard-Nessie, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jenkin Weaver в 1498 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1524 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Marguerite Nanton nació en 1473, en Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Nanton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Hermione Billard-Nessie, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Jenkin Weaver en 1498, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1524, a la edad de 51 años.
